lead: D5-08 BTC exchange reserve-depletion / netflow (pre-registered single config smooth=14,zwin=365,thr=1.0,long/flat)
cross_asset_status: $0 free flow data EXHAUSTED — Coin Metrics community = btc+eth only; ETH inverts. Deepened on BTC robustness+honesty, not new assets.

a_rolling_stability.read: Sign-persistent (10/15 yrs +, 36/53 rolling windows +), but only 3/15 yrs individually clear DSR@N=1; early 2015-16 negative. Not a single-window fluke in sign; significance is regime-concentrated (strong 2017-19, 2023-25).

b_perturbation_robustness.read: 100% of definitional perturbations (EMA10/14/21, z270/365/540, gross-outflow-only, thr0.75-1.25) stay forward-POSITIVE (median fwd 0.84) — mechanism robust in SIGN. But only 27% keep surrogate p<0.05 and 36% keep DSR@N=1: the pre-registered point sits on the STRONG edge of its own neighborhood (favorably positioned), not the center. Honest deflation: the binding-gate pass is partly point-specific.

c_paper_forward.read: STRONGEST result. Realistic next-open fills + 4bps + 8h funding: net Sharpe 1.187, DSR@N=1 0.985 PASS, surrogate p 0.044 PASS, BB CI strictly positive, $1,701/mo@$100k. Execution drag only 0.04 Sharpe (funding 0.07, next-open fill ~0). NOT a close-to-close idealization artifact.

d_btc_vs_eth.most_likely_cause: REFLEXIVE-NARRATIVE + DATA-COVERAGE (not sign-flip, not pure fluke). BTC linear IC is weak (t=1.37) BECAUSE the signal is NON-LINEAR (tail-band only). The actual bet — long on z<=-1 — has BTC ON-day mean 0.314%/d (CI95 excludes 0) that is STABLE early-0.309% vs recent-0.321% (so not regime luck), and sign-stable 10/12 yrs. ETH ON-day mean is -0.002%/d (dead, negative in recent regime), IC half-strength and sign-stable only 5/10 (coin-flip). Outflow->accumulation is a BTC market-structure narrative (cold-storage/self-custody supply-shock); ETH flows route through staking/L2/DeFi the exchange-wallet metric maps differently, plus thinner ETH attribution. Caveat: BTC ON-day mean does NOT exceed the unconditional drift CI — incremental alpha over always-long is positive but not independently CI-significant => this is a TIMING/RISK overlay, not standalone alpha.

forward_overlay_quality.read: On the held-out tail the overlay BEATS B&H Sharpe at 16% exposure with 6x smaller drawdown — attractive as a risk-managed BTC overlay OOS.

binding_gate: cross-asset generalization (unchanged) + partial point-specificity of the binding-gate strength within the perturbation cloud
honest_outcome: PROMISING, BTC-only — CONFIRMED. The single pre-registered config clears DSR@N=1 and surrogate on a proper paper-forward sim it never saw (net 1.19 after realistic execution+funding), the tail-band effect is regime-stable and price-orthogonal, but it does NOT generalize beyond BTC on the only other free-data asset, and its binding-gate STRENGTH is somewhat favorably positioned within its own definitional neighborhood. Gated on PAID multi-asset flow + LIVE paper-forward.
